overview: A mobile-friendly media storage app where users can upload, organize, and manage multiple file formats (docs, images, videos, audio) from iPhone and Android devices with user authentication.
features: Multi-format file upload (PDF, Word, PNG, JPEG, MP4, MOV, MP3, etc.)
Mobile-optimized upload UI for iPhone and Android
Media library with grid view and category filters
File preview for images, videos, and audio
Search and sort files by name, date, or size
File management: rename, delete, copy link
